# Playwright Automation Assignment

## Tech Stack
- Python
- Playwright
- Pytest

## Framework
- Page Object Model (POM)

## Features
- Login automation
- Assertions
- Dynamic waits
- Reusable page classes

## Folder Structure
- pages/
- tests/
- assets/

## AI Tools Usage
I used AI tools like ChatGPT during the assignment to:
- Understand Playwright concepts
- Improve locators and assertions
- Debug automation issues
- Learn framework structure
- Optimize test flow

AI tools helped improve productivity and speed during automation development.
